column1: # NightCrate external reference overrides. MIT licensed.
# Precedence: this file runs AFTER the Wikidata loader. Rows here overwrite
#   - upsert:      identifier AND url both provided → insert/update the ref
#   - suppression: identifier AND url both empty    → delete the ref if present
#   dso_designation — any form recognized by /api/dso/lookup (e.g. M42
#   language        — required for wikipedia (e.g. en); must be empty for wikidata
#   identifier      — QID for wikidata; article slug (underscores) for wikipedia
#   note            — human note; ignored by loader
# Examples (commented out — add real rows below the header):
